coachAM: Your consistent morning gratitude entries are a stark contrast to your evening journal's absence, revealing a profound disconnect between your declared intentions and actual execution, especially in the foundational disciplines of sleep and training. The persistent breakdown in your physical and mental recovery protocols is not an isolated issue but a direct symptom of unmanaged digital input and the resulting cognitive fragmentation, preventing the deep work and sustained focus required for elite performance. To re-establish the integrity of your sovereign morning and reclaim your physical edge, install a hard stop on all screens and digital inputs by 9 PM tonight, without exception.
